title: Admin Login and Authentication
description: Verify admin can successfully log in and access admin dashboard

steps.description: Wait for Clerk sign-in form to load (look for email input field)
Fill in email input field with admin email from environment variable TEST_ADMIN_EMAIL (required for admin tests)
Fill in password input field with admin password from environment variable TEST_ADMIN_PASSWORD (required for admin tests)
Click sign-in button or submit form
Verify successful login (redirected away from /sign-in page, admin menu visible)
Verify admin dashboard is accessible (URL contains /admin or redirected to /admin)

title: Admin Home Page Load
description: Verify admin home page loads successfully with all navigation buttons

steps.description: Verify page loads without errors (HTTP 200, no console errors)
Verify admin navigation buttons are visible (Admin Home, Manage Users, Manage Events, etc.)
Verify page title or header indicates admin dashboard

title: Manage Users Page Load
description: Verify manage users page loads successfully

steps.description: Verify page title or header indicates user management
Verify user list or management interface is visible (may be empty)
